identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer (Prestige Finance Edition)
identity.mission: Create a high-trust, premium financial advisory platform that breaks the 'corporate template' mold while strictly adhering to the Industrial Alliance (iA) visual identity.

theme.description: Primary Light Mode for trust and readability (Services, Tools, Content). Strategic Dark Mode for high-impact sections (Hero, CTA, Footer) to evoke the 'Midnight Blue' premium feel.

headings.usage: All H1-H3 headings. Use for high-impact statements and 'Prestige' messaging.

body.usage: Paragraphs, UI elements, Tools, Data tables.

accent.usage: Financial figures, data points, tool inputs (adds technical credibility).

primary.name: iA Legacy Blue
primary.usage: Primary Buttons, Active States, Key Highlights

secondary.name: iA Sky Blue
secondary.usage: Gradients, Accents, Success States, Soft Backgrounds

dark.name: iA Midnight Blue
dark.usage: Headings (Text), Hero Backgrounds, Footers, Strong Contrast

prestige.usage: Premium Service Cards, Testimonial Backgrounds, Borders

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

buttons.primary: bg-[#064dd9] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-[#01233f] transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-[#064dd9]/20
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#064dd9] border border-[#064dd9] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-[#dbf0ff] transition-all
buttons.prestige: bg-[#756b5f] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 hover:bg-[#5e554b] shadow-md

cards.service: bg-white border border-[#e2dcd0] rounded-xl p-8 hover:border-[#064dd9] transition-colors group relative overflow-hidden
cards.feature: bg-[#F8FAFC] rounded-2xl p-6 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300

hero.structure: Left: High-impact typography + Call to Action. Right: Dynamic image or 3D abstract element.

services.card_style: Prestige Beige Backgrounds with dark text for contrast.

tools.style: Clean white containers on a subtle grey background (#F8FAFC). Focus on data clarity.

images.strategy: Professional, Authentic, Quebec Context. Avoid generic US-style stock photos.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure #064dd9 is used on white or #dbf0ff backgrounds. On #01233f backgrounds, use White text.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring using #73c4ef.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. SETUP TAILWIND: Configure the 'colors' object in tailwind.config.js exactly as specified in the 'palette' section.
3. IMPLEMENT HERO: Build the Hero section first using the 'Midnight Blue' theme to establish the premium feel.
4. USE SHADCN: Use standard Shadcn components but override the 'rounded-md' with 'rounded-xl' or 'rounded-full' to match the softer, friendlier finance aesthetic.
5. PRESTIGE SECTIONS: For the 'Why Work Together' and 'Testimonials' sections, use the 'Prestige' color palette (Beige/Taupe) to differentiate from the standard blue service sections.
6. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, inputs, and links.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Avoid 'Inter' font. Use Manrope for body.
Use 2x more whitespace than you think is necessary.
Never use pure black (#000000). Use #01233f or #0F172A.
